api_export.name: REST API & CSV Export
api_export.description: Exposes collection data via a JSON REST API and provides a CSV export button in the admin panel.
api_export.author: System

blog.name: Blog
blog.description: A robust, lightweight blog module for the Collection Portal.
blog.author: Antigravity

contact_us.name: Contact Us
contact_us.description: Adds a Contact Us page with a form and stores submissions. Admins can view and manage messages.
contact_us.author: System

curated_collections.name: Curated Collections
curated_collections.description: Allows administrators to create themed groups of items (e.g., 'Apollo 11 Mission', 'Ancient Coins') that appear in search results and have a dedicated gallery view.
curated_collections.author: System

item_comments.name: Community Notes
item_comments.description: Enables crowdsourced historical context by allowing public users to leave moderated comments on artifacts.
item_comments.author: System

media_manager.name: Media Manager
media_manager.description: Audits collection media and generates missing thumbnails.
media_manager.author: Antigravity

newsletter.name: Newsletter / Subscribers
newsletter.description: Allows visitors to subscribe to email updates and provides an admin interface to blast emails.
newsletter.author: System

panoramic_viewer.name: Panoramic Viewer
panoramic_viewer.description: Enables interactive 360° panoramic image support for items with multiple view support.
panoramic_viewer.author: Antigravity

people.name: People & Biographies
people.description: Create Wikipedia-style profiles for people related to the collection.
people.author: Antigravity

postmark_atlas.name: Postmark Atlas
postmark_atlas.description: Adds a postmark location tracker checklist and an interactive map visualization.
postmark_atlas.author: Antigravity

sample_module.name: Sample Module
sample_module.description: Demonstrates activation hooks, injecting CSS, adding custom admin pages, and content hooks.
sample_module.author: System

seo_meta.name: SEO Meta
seo_meta.description: Adds SEO title and description tags to items and categories.
seo_meta.author: Antigravity

set_manager.name: Collection Checklist (Sets)
set_manager.description: Premium system to define, track, and share collection sets with curated checklists and progress bars.
set_manager.author: Antigravity

sitemap.name: Sitemap Generator
sitemap.description: Automatically generates a sitemap.xml for all items and categories.
sitemap.author: Antigravity

storage_labels.name: Physical Storage & QR Labels
storage_labels.description: Track the physical location of items and generate printable QR code labels.
storage_labels.author: Antigravity

theme_studio.name: Theme Studio
theme_studio.description: Visual customizer for the Custom theme — configure colors, fonts, home page layout and hero image.
theme_studio.author: System

timeline.name: Interactive Timeline
timeline.description: Plots collection items on a beautiful, interactive timeline based on their start year. Accessible at /timeline.php.
timeline.author: System

trade_manager.name: Trade Manager
trade_manager.description: Allows users to request trades for items in the collection.
trade_manager.author: Antigravity

user_galleries.name: User Galleries
user_galleries.description: Allows visitors to curate and share their own personal galleries.
user_galleries.author: Antigravity

watermarker.name: Digital Watermarking
watermarker.description: Automatically stamps the site logo or title onto uploaded high-resolution images to protect digital assets.
watermarker.author: System
